provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Aquatic Weeds (Control) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: any article designed for use in, on, under or around surface waters, which comes into contact with water during use
any aquatic weed specified in the Schedule, and includes any portion, fragment, trace or seed of any such weed
any vessel or craft designed, suitable or used for the purpose of floating in, on, or under surface waters
waters declared under section 6 to be infested with aquatic weeds
all water flowing over the surface of the ground or contained in or flowing from any river, spring, stream or watercourse or any lake, dam, pan, pond or swamp.
